health_conditions: partial tear to multiple elbow ligaments
strain to tendons/ligaments in elbow region

benefits.description: Exceptional healing of ligament/tendon injuries at injection sites; zero pain in treated areas; rapid return to intensive biking within ~15 days of injury
Recovery of severely limited range of motion
Resolution of 7.5/10 pain at treated sites

protocol_notes: Injury from FOOSH (fall on outstretched hand) from 5 ft height. Administration began 1.5 weeks post-injury. Treated multiple afflicted areas with 150 mcg per site injected subcutaneously once daily for 5 consecutive days. One ligament deliberately left untreated as control. Post-injection protocol included vibration massage and gentle stretching. No other drug treatment (anti-inflammatory or otherwise) used. Light warm/cold cycles and stretching in shower during initial 1.5 week period before BPC treatment. Control area (untreated ligament) still showed strong pain; user planned to treat this area next.
